name: Fairways and Greens Golf Center
about: Fairways and Greens Golf Center is a year-round, membership-based golf practice facility located in West Knoxville. The center offers a comprehensive range of services including a driving range, Trackman-equipped bays for simulation and practice, a nine-hole par 3 course called 'The Loop,' club fitting with professional instructors, and a fitness center. It is recognized as a Top 50 Stand-Alone Range by the Golf Range Association of America and a Top 100 Clubfitter by Golf Digest. Membership provides benefits like unlimited range balls and discounted lessons, while non-members are welcome for daily fees and specific services.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for game improvement and virtual play
Comprehensive practice facilities including a 9-hole par 3 course
Award-winning club fitting and PGA-certified instruction
Year-round operation with both indoor and outdoor bays

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food services

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for both swing analysis and virtual golf simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. The facility also offers club fitting services if you need new equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, so it appears outside food and drinks are not prohibited.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically takes about 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is family-friendly with instructors available for all ages and skill levels, including junior lessons.
